world.title: U.S. couple accused of kidnapping 10-year-old to potentially undergo gender transition surgery in Cuba

science.description: Paleontologists in Brazil have identified a new genus and species of hyperodapedontine rhynchosaur -- an extinct lineage of beaked, herbivorous reptiles -- based on a partial skull and lower jaws recovered from Triassic rocks.

science.title: Interstellar Comet 3I/ATLAS Left a Trail of Methane in its Wake
science.description: A new analysis of data obtained by JWST on 3I/ATLAS as it was on its way out of the Solar System (in December 2025) showed that its interior is rich in methane ice.

science.title: New Research Reveals That Interstellar Comet 3I/ATLAS Formed in a System Far Colder Than Our Own
science.description: The interplanetary comet 3I/ATLAS is remarkably rich in a specific type of water that contains deuterium, meaning it came from somewhere colder and with lower levels of radiation than our early Solar System.
